title: Keybind Viewer
description: A PvP utility mod that shows you the keybinds for each slot in your hot bar!
body:
**_Keybind View_** – A mod that displays your hotbar keybinds and syncs with changes made in the keybinds menu.

This mod improves your in-game experience by adding a UI that shows the keybind for each hotbar slot.

### Useful for:
- PvP
- Remembering your keybinds at a glance
- Overall better gameplay experience

<details>
<summary>Warning</summary>

This mod may not display some slots correctly when using the [Totem Counter mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/totemcounter) (especially the 5th slot with default placement).
</details>

Note: I didn't know about [Show Keybinds](https://modrinth.com/mod/showkeybinds) before making this!
